summary: Get caught up.

title: Carney’s Gordie Howe Bridge Deal Full Text Splits Revenues With US for 15 Years
title_cn: 卡尼的戈迪豪大桥交易全文与美国分享收入 15 年
summary: Plus: Tariff threats over wildfire smoke

title: China Urges Better Cooperation With Kyrgyzstan on Green Minerals
title_cn: 中国敦促与吉尔吉斯斯坦加强绿色矿产合作
summary: China urged stronger cooperation with Kyrgyzstan across the green minerals industrial chain, while calling for the protection of the rights and interests of Chinese companies in the country, according to a statement from the Ministry of Commerce on Saturday.

title: China’s Siemens Competitor Eyes Buying Its Way Into Europe
title_cn: 中国的西门子竞争对手希望通过收购进入欧洲
summary: Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co. Ltd. is considering acquisitions in Europe, signaling the Chinese company is readying a push to compete in Europe with industrial incumbents like Siemens AG and top auto supplier Robert Bosch GmbH.

title: India Moves Against Youth Protesters Before Parliament Session
title_cn: 印度在议会会议前对青年抗议者采取行动
summary: Indian authorities moved against protesters in New Delhi ahead of demonstrations against unemployment and alleged examination scams, as the movement adds pressure on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.

title: China Solar Cell Exports Extend Decline in June
title_cn: 6月份中国太阳能电池出口延续下滑
summary: China’s solar cell exports fell for a second month in June, an indication that overseas demand is weakening after a surge in shipments earlier in the year.

title: China Seeks Stable, Transparent Mineral Rules From Indonesia
title_cn: 中国寻求印尼稳定、透明的矿产规则
summary: China said it hopes Indonesia can provide a stable and transparent policy environment for its mineral sector, as the two countries deepen economic ties.

title: Sheinbaum, Carney to Watch World Cup Final With Trump
title_cn: 辛鲍姆、卡尼将与特朗普一起观看世界杯决赛
summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum and Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney will travel to the US to attend Sunday’s World Cup final on President Donald Trump’s invitation, creating the opportunity for a reset after a month filled with regional tensions.

title: Apple Briefly Tops Nvidia as World’s Most Valuable Company
title_cn: 苹果短暂超越英伟达成为全球最有价值公司
summary: Apple Inc. briefly overtook Nvidia Corp. as the world’s most valuable company, a title the chipmaker has held since May 2025.

title: Baker Tilly Eyes $3 Billion in Debt to Replace Private Credit
title_cn: Baker Tilly 计划用 30 亿美元债务取代私人信贷
summary: Deutsche Bank AG is preparing to sell about $3 billion in debt markets for accounting services firm Baker Tilly Advisory Group to refinance private credit loans, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Chip Stocks Slide Into Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片股在人工智能放松中滑入熊市：市场结束
summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, driving the high-profile group of stocks to a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.

title: Gauge of Oracle’s Credit Risk Hits Fresh All Time High
title_cn: 甲骨文信用风险指标创历史新高
summary: A measure of Oracle Corp.’s credit risk hit a record high on Friday as concerns grew about both the company’s aggressive cash-burn and the future profitability of its artificial intelligence investments amid a new Chinese model that could rival offerings from companies like OpenAI.

title: CoreLogic Wraps Up $5.25 Billion Debt Deal With Hefty Yields
title_cn: CoreLogic 完成 52.5 亿美元债务交易，收益丰厚
summary: CoreLogic Inc. raised $5.25 billion from a debt sale after amending the terms and offering some of the year’s highest yields in response to lukewarm investor demand.

title: ‘Sea of Red’ Hits Emerging Stocks as AI Concerns Jolts Markets
title_cn: 人工智能担忧震撼市场，“红色海洋”冲击新兴股市
summary: Emerging-market stocks slumped, with a key gauge sliding into technical correction on mounting concerns the outlook for artificial intelligence no longer justifies the industry’s elevated valuations.

title: AI Upheaval Crushes Retail Traders Crowding Into Leveraged Funds
title_cn: 人工智能的剧变压垮了散户纷纷涌入杠杆基金
summary: A surprise breakthrough from Chinese startup Moonshot rippled through global markets Friday, sending AI and semiconductor stocks sharply lower and reviving memories of last year’s so-called DeepSeek moment. It was the latest reminder that markets are being reshaped at extraordinary speed and that assumptions about tomorrow’s winners can change almost overnight.

title: Gold Trims Weekly Drop on Dip-Buying Despite Rate Hike Odds
title_cn: 尽管加息可能性不大，黄金因逢低买入而收窄周跌幅
summary: Gold trimmed its weekly loss as some investors bought on dips after the precious metal broke below a key price level, even as escalating war tensions kept interest rate hike bets alive.

title: Hedge Fund Blasts SEC Settlement After ‘Gag Rule’ Lifted
title_cn: 对冲基金在“禁言规则”解除后抨击美国证券交易委员会的和解
summary: Connecticut hedge fund Deccan Value Investors is speaking out about its 2022 settlement of Securities and Exchange Commission claims that it breached its fiduciary duty to two university endowments after the regulator recently lifted its so-called gag rule.

title: US Stocks End Week Lower on Fears of Another ‘DeepSeek Moment’
title_cn: 由于担心另一个“DeepSeek 时刻”，美国股市本周收低
summary: US stocks finished the week lower as semiconductor names dipped following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.

title: Sweetgreen Pares Drop as Parasite Tied to Taco Bell Lettuce
title_cn: 塔可钟生菜上有寄生虫，Sweetgreen Pares 掉落
summary: Sweetgreen Inc. shares surged on Friday, halting a four-day skid, after US regulators said a parasite outbreak that’s sickened thousands across several states was traced to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell restaurants.

title: Chips Stocks Sink Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
title_cn: 105%人工智能涨势失败，芯片股陷入熊市
summary: A closely watched index of semiconductor stocks fell into a bear market, unwinding a chunk of the blistering memory-led rally that saw the gauge more than double in just three months.

title: Martin Shkreli Is Back, Shorting Stocks and Taking On Everyone
title_cn: 马丁·施克雷利 (Martin Shkreli) 回归，做空股票并与所有人较量
summary: Martin Shkreli wants to make one thing clear to anyone who’s willing to listen: He’s back and he still doesn’t care how many people he ticks off along the way.

title: Hedge Funds Add Bullish Oil Bets at Fastest Pace in a Decade
title_cn: 对冲基金以十年来最快的速度增加看涨石油押注
summary: Hedge funds piled into bullish bets on Brent oil at the fastest pace in almost a decade as fighting between Iran and the US ramped up, dampening investors’ expectations of a sustained recovery in shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Apple Raises iPhone 17 Price by 10% in Japan as Yen Stays Weak
title_cn: 日元持续疲软，苹果将 iPhone 17 在日本的售价提高 10%
summary: Apple Inc. raised the prices of iPhones and some other products in Japan as the local currency continues to hover near its lowest level in four decades.

title: China Dismisses Claim that It Illicitly Extracts Foreign AI Tech
title_cn: 中国否认非法窃取外国人工智能技术的说法
summary: China brushed off allegations that the country distills foreign technology, after US firms including Anthropic PBC said Chinese rivals illicitly extract results from top American models to advance their own capabilities.

title: China’s Moonshot Unveils AI Model, Fueling Tech Rout
title_cn: 中国的登月计划推出人工智能模型，助推技术溃败
summary: Chinese AI pioneer Moonshot unveiled a new model that it claims performs on par with some of the top-tier platforms from OpenAI and Anthropic PBC, the latest sign that the Asian country’s artificial intelligence labs are closing a technology gap with the US.

title: Apple in Early Settlement Talks With DOJ Over Antitrust Case
title_cn: 苹果公司正在与司法部就反垄断案件进行早期和解谈判
summary: Apple Inc. and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws.

title: Netflix Shares Tumble After Forecast for Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 股价因增长放缓预测而暴跌
summary: Netflix Inc. shares fell after the company forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, contributing to investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future.

title: IPhone Hacking Firm Sues Ex-Worker Over Alleged Theft of Secrets
title_cn: iPhone 黑客公司起诉前员工涉嫌窃取机密
summary: Magnet Forensics Inc., a Canadian cybersecurity firm, accused a former contractor of sharing trade secrets about a previously unknown flaw used to hack iPhones with a rival firm.

title: SpaceX in Talks to Sell Computing Power to Pentagon, WSJ Says
title_cn: 据《华尔街日报》报道，SpaceX 正在洽谈向五角大楼出售计算能力
summary: SpaceX is in talks to sell computing power to the US Department of Defense, the Wall Street Journal reported on Friday, adding to a spate of infrastructure deals for Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence conglomerate.

title: What Is Moonshot AI? Why China’s New Model Is Roiling Markets
title_cn: 什么是登月人工智能？为什么中国的新模式搅动市场
summary: Chinese startup Moonshot AI released a new artificial-intelligence model on July 17 that drew global attention both for its powerful capabilities and for sending stock markets reeling around the world.

title: Meta in Talks to Sell Computing Power to Anthropic
title_cn: Meta 正在洽谈向 Anthropic 出售计算能力
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is in early discussions to lease computing power from its data centers to Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, an opportunity for the social media giant to build a new business around its heavy investment in AI infrastructure.

title: Valve’s 14-Year Journey to Make the Steam Machine
title_cn: Valve 14 年蒸汽机制造之旅
summary: The company first began laying the groundwork for this year’s hardware way back in 2012

title: Sateliot Expands Funding to Offer Satellite Service to Phones
title_cn: Sateliot 扩大融资规模，为手机提供卫星服务
summary: Satellite startup Sateliot is seeking to boost an ongoing fundraising round to as much as €150 million ($172 million), about a 50% increase as the Spanish company aims to offer satellite connectivity directly to smartphones.

title: ASML to Pay One-Time €20,000 Bonus to Staff as AI Propels Demand
title_cn: 随着人工智能推动需求，ASML 将向员工一次性支付 20,000 欧元奖金
summary: ASML Holding NV will give employees globally a one-time €20,000 ($22,862) bonus, joining other firms in the chip industry to offer payouts as artificial intelligence demand fuels record sales.

title: Bethesda Announces New ‘Fallout’ Roadmap Following Xbox Reset
title_cn: 贝塞斯达 (Bethesda) 宣布 Xbox 重置后新的《辐射》路线图
summary: The studio confirmed development on ‘Fallout 5’ and a new game with Obsidian Entertainment

title: Spain, Portugal Data Center Boom Faces Electrical Grid Bottlenecks
title_cn: 西班牙、葡萄牙数据中心繁荣面临电网瓶颈
summary: Spain and Portugal are experiencing a significant data center boom, but constraints around electrical grid capacity, network access and permitting are slowing the pace of new project development.

title: AI-Based Businesses Are Diversifying and Rejecting AI Model Monogamy
title_cn: 基于人工智能的企业正在多元化并拒绝人工智能模式一夫一妻制
summary: Businesses that depend on any one AI model are vulnerable, so they’re adapting

title: China Can Still Win the AI Race With Inferior Technology
title_cn: 中国仍能以劣势技术赢得人工智能竞赛
summary: It’s about economics, power as well as engineering.

title: Xi Seeks Global AI Sway as Surging Chinese Models Spur Alarm
title_cn: 中国模式崛起敲响警钟，习近平谋求全球人工智能影响力
summary: President Xi Jinping used the rise of China’s AI models to stake his claim on shaping the technology’s global rules, even as their growing power stirs security concerns in Washington and Beijing alike.

title: China to Impose Consumption Tax on Solar and Lithium Batteries
title_cn: 中国将对太阳能和锂电池征收消费税
summary: China plans to end a decade-long consumption tax exemption for solar and lithium-ion batteries, marking a policy shift as Beijing seeks to rein in intense competition in the industries central to the clean-energy transition.

title: The Odyssey: Christopher Nolan Movie Stars Zendaya, Matt Damon in Homer Epic
title_cn: 奥德赛：克里斯托弗·诺兰电影明星赞达亚、马特·达蒙在荷马史诗中
summary: The Odyssey hits theaters on Friday and is expected to bring in roughly $100 million in its opening weekend.

title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Enters Correction on Fears AI Rally Overdone
title_cn: 日本日经 225 指数因担心人工智能反弹过度而进入修正
summary: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Stock Average tumbled to close more than 10% below its June 25 peak, a move termed as a technical correction, amid concerns the global artificial intelligence rally may be stretched.

title: German Far-Right ‘Trojan Horse’ Triggers Alarm Over Intelligence
title_cn: 德国极右翼“特洛伊木马”引发情报警报
summary: German security authorities are rushing to ensure sensitive information is kept safe in the event that the country’s far-right party takes government control for the first time in an eastern region later this year.

title: Andy Burnham’s Vow to Change UK Labour Already Risks Coming Unstuck
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）改变英国劳工的誓言已经面临落空的风险
summary: Andy Burnham wanted to take over as Britain’s prime minister on a wave of hope, positive vibes and a promise to end the Labour Party infighting that marred Keir Starmer’s premiership. That optimism is fading before he’s even taken office.

title: China Lauds US Restoration of HK Privileges Revoked by Trump
title_cn: 中国赞扬美国恢复被特朗普取消的香港特权
summary: The US restored privileges for Hong Kong that President Donald Trump revoked in 2020, in his first term, triggering praise from China, which described the move as an important step toward improving bilateral ties.

title: US Renews Strikes on Iran, Pushing Oil Up Most Since April
title_cn: 美国重启对伊朗的打击，推高油价自四月以来最大涨幅
summary: The US and Iran traded attacks again on Friday, pressuring oil prices and making a quick return to the fragile ceasefire deal signed last month even less likely.

title: Anwar’s Next Test of Power Looms After Landslide Loss in Malaysia’s Johor
title_cn: 马来西亚柔佛山体滑坡损失后，安瓦尔即将进行下一次电力测试
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s Pakatan Harapan coalition is beginning a two-week campaign to win the next state election, days after a bruising defeat in the south led him to back away from talk of a snap national vote.

title: Trump Praises Infantino Over Red Card Reversal, Jabs at Co-Hosts
title_cn: 特朗普赞扬因凡蒂诺红牌逆转，并猛烈抨击共同主持人
summary: President Donald Trump praised FIFA President Gianni Infantino for intervening to help lift a red-card suspension for US player Folarin Balogun, revisiting a World Cup decision that outraged soccer fans across the globe.

title: Mexico’s New US Ambassador Sees USMCA Deal Coming Together This Year
title_cn: 墨西哥新任美国大使预计今年将达成 USMCA 协议
summary: The high-stakes review of North America’s free trade pact should be completed later this year, Mexico’s top diplomat in the US said in an interview with Bloomberg Television.

title: States Win Suit Over Trump Administration Termination of Grants
title_cn: 各州因特朗普政府终止拨款而赢得诉讼
summary: A group of Democratic state attorneys general and governors won a lawsuit accusing the Trump administration of illegally using a budget loophole to block billions of dollars in federal grants for public services that were already approved by Congress.

title: Burnham Faces Pivotal Call on Whether to Let Trump Use UK Bases
title_cn: 伯纳姆面临是否允许特朗普使用英国基地的关键呼吁
summary: The resumption of US strikes against Iran has thrust incoming UK prime minister Andy Burnham into a potential day one decision on how much to support Britain’s closest ally in its controversial military campaign.

title: Wall Street Braces to Pay Up for Trump’s Market-Moving Posts
title_cn: 华尔街准备为特朗普影响市场的帖子付出代价
summary: Promotional emails began circulating across Wall Street trading desks weeks ago, teasing a new product from President Donald Trump’s social media company.

title: US Considers Creating Finra-Like Watchdog to Vet Top AI Models
title_cn: 美国考虑创建类似金融监管局的监管机构来审查顶级人工智能模型
summary: The Trump administration is considering plans for an independent regulator to vet the safety of artificial intelligence models with industry input, after Silicon Valley leaders complained about the ad-hoc nature of recent US moves to slow the release of cutting-edge AI systems.

title: Farage Faces Fringe Candidates Including Binface in UK Election
title_cn: Farage 在英国大选中面临包括 Binface 在内的边缘候选人
summary: Nigel Farage will defend his seat against a slate of fringe candidates including the satirical Count Binface, local officials confirmed, setting up a race that will test the strength of the opposition against his brand of populist politics.

title: Landmark Crypto Bill Could Pass This Midterms Year Despite the Odds
title_cn: 尽管可能性不大，具有里程碑意义的加密货币法案仍可能在今年的中期选举中获得通过
summary: Prediction markets peg the chances at 37%.

title: Trump Backs Darline Graham for South Carolina Senate Seat
title_cn: 特朗普支持达林·格雷厄姆竞选南卡罗来纳州参议院席位
summary: President Donald Trump urged South Carolina Senator Darline Graham, the sister of the late Lindsey Graham, to run for a full Senate term in the November election.

title: Trump’s New Election Documents Undercut His Own Fraud Claims
title_cn: 特朗普的新选举文件削弱了他自己的欺诈指控
summary: President Donald Trump pointed to reams of declassified materials as proof of his claims of election vulnerabilities that he alleged in his prime-time address Thursday night. In many cases, the documents did the opposite.

title: Jersey City Wants to Ban Data Centers on Industrial Property
title_cn: 泽西市希望禁止工业产权上的数据中心
summary: Jersey City has introduced a law to ban data centers as the primary use of industrial property.

title: Trump Sows US Election Doubts in Speech Before Midterms
title_cn: 特朗普在中期选举前的演讲中播撒美国大选疑虑
summary: President Donald Trump devoted a prime-time address to reviving unsubstantiated claims that the 2020 election was stolen and raising doubts about the security of the upcoming midterms, turning his attention to a years-long grievance at a perilous moment for his presidency.

title: Reform UK Pitches Donors for More Cash, Citing Security Risk
title_cn: 英国改革组织以安全风险为由向捐助者寻求更多现金
summary: A close ally of Nigel Farage said his Reform UK party is spending at a rate of more than £7 million ($9.4 million) a year to keep the party’s leader and other figures safe, as it pitched for more funding during a probe into the party’s finances.

title: Trump’s Media Firm to Sell Traders Fast Access to His Posts
title_cn: 特朗普的媒体公司向交易者出售快速访问他的帖子的权限
summary: President Donald Trump’s media company wants traders and investors to pay for real-time access to Truth Social posts from the social media platform’s “highest-ranking” accounts.

title: Senate Crypto Talks Hit Turbulence as Window for Passage Narrows
title_cn: 参议院加密货币谈判遭遇动荡，通道窗口缩小
summary: Senate efforts to pass a landmark cryptocurrency bill hit a snag this week as Democratic negotiators indicated they don’t yet support the latest GOP framework and some members balked at their narrowing window to act.
